opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain in my toes is excruciating, it wakes me up, and now my second toe has turned completely black.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Pain has become unbearable overnight and a toe has changed colour, so patient wants urgent help.

symptom_narrative.onset: cramping foot pain with walking started gradually about 6 months ago; over the last 48 hours it has changed to constant pain at rest
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 months of walking-related pain, now 48 hours of constant severe rest pain
symptom_narrative.character: started as a cramping ache in the arch of the foot with walking; now an intense, unremitting ache even at rest, severe enough to wake him from sleep
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating — the worst pain he's had, disrupts sleep completely
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: arch of the foot originally, now the whole foot and especially the second toe
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: used to only happen with walking, now constant, present even at rest and overnight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hanging the foot down over the edge of the bed seems to ease it slightly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking, lying flat with the foot elevated in bed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: his second toe has turned completely black over the last day or so and feels cold; he can't put weight on the foot because of the pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: cramping with walking has been going on for about 6 months, but nothing like this level of pain or the colour change before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot walk or weight-bear on the affected foot; unable to work as a result

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taking them heavily for the pain, not sure of exact dose

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: heavy current smoker — around 30 cigarettes a day for the last 15 years
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, works in manual labour, relies on being able to stand and walk for his income

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried about losing his job if he can't work, and frightened about losing the toe/foot; may be reluctant to fully accept how serious smoking cessation is

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, urgent messages focused on the pain and the colour of the toe

access_barriers.transport: lives alone, no companion mentioned to help with transport

objective_data_offered.value: second toe on the right foot has turned completely black over the last day
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described/video-observed colour change, not a clinician-graded assessment of tissue viability
